prompt:
A tidy security-themed still life on a desk: a small lock-shaped hardware token, a pair of abstract key-card shapes, and a tablet showing a certificate-chain diagram rendered as clean boxes and connecting lines with no readable text. Subtle cues suggest multiple certificate types (two distinct key icons and two different color-coded chain paths), communicating a “bundle” of fresh certs with renewal hooks configured.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk infrastructure workspace: soft cinematic lighting, clean materials, no brand logos, and no readable text or UI labels. Keep the composition calm and icon-like, clearly reading as “TLS certificates / security bundle.”
